title: Weapons of Rome
description: Weapons of Rome adds 9 new weapon types that were used in the Ancient Roman Empire.
body:
![bg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vcQUBLG9/images/33ee2c97826980c030954f256fe7251fe8c593a4.gif)

**[Aquarius Libs](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquarius-libs)** and **[Pisces Libs](https://modrinth.com/mod/pisces-libs)** needs to be installed for this mod to work!

 

Weapons of Rome adds 9 new weapon types that were used in the Ancient Roman Empire.

The items can be crafted from wood, stone, copper, iron, gold, diamond and can be upgraded into netherite weapons.

 ---

**Fuscina:**

_A three-pronged trident used in ancient Rome both as a traditional fishing tool and as a specialized weapon in gladiatorial combat._

A same damage as the vanilla sword and same speed as the trident, also gets an interaction range bonus (+1)(+ trident enchantments)

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vcQUBLG9/images/20c1c9ea978ac524a3eaf559333bdf20bfc9c6c5.gif)
 ---

**Gladius:**

_The iconic short sword used by legionaries primarily for stabbing in close-quarters combat._

A bit weaker, but faster then then the default sword.

![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vcQUBLG9/images/b07c2f529efcce8aeb1f8b4c4090e0e9c20b9cb7.gif)
 ---

**Pilum:**

_A javelin commonly used by the Roman army in ancient times.
It bent upon impact into enemy shields to make them too heavy to use._

Not strong and slow like the trident, but the target drops their shield on hit, also gets an interaction range bonus (+1)(+ trident enchantments)

![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vcQUBLG9/images/25618e0a0bff9d952f0f5b60526610bfb205b2d6.gif)
 ---

**Plumbata:**

_Throwing darts that were carried inside the reverse of a soldier's shield and were used to inflict damage on enemies at a distance before engaging in close combat._

Weak, but is a ranged weapon that is stackable.

![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vcQUBLG9/images/6c67403740342b813d5056cce43c3b97b6dcb770.gif)
 ---

**Pugio:**

_A heavy dagger carried on a soldier's belt. It acted as a utility tool or a fallback weapon of last resort during chaotic melees._

Low Damage, but fast.

![5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vcQUBLG9/images/44d1b84eee096728f7a95bc6cd041b19625a04c2.gif)
 ---

**Scissor:**

_Designed for close-range combat, an extraordinarily rare and specialized weapon used by a distinct class of Roman gladiator of the same name._

It is weak, but fast.

![6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vcQUBLG9/images/49685e955096d263320f9aa21ae97eda67e306a6.gif)
 ---

**Scutum:**

_A giant shield that can also attack with its hard center made from hard material._

Weak and slow, but can block attacks(from 75-100%)

![7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vcQUBLG9/images/2eb44c86d0602815e29359922a127ae3c1f3f325.gif)
 ---

**Sica:**

_A curved short sword or large dagger of ancient Illyrians, Thracians, and Dacians 
and it was also used in ancient Rome favored by specialized Thraex gladiators to reach around enemy shields._

Low damage, fast and can disable shields on hit.

![8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vcQUBLG9/images/2b5ae7cd24dd2b7df79717cadc8d11e1eba3903d.gif)
 ---

**Spatha:**

_A longer sword originally used by cavalry, which eventually replaced the shorter gladius in the later Roman infantry._

A bit stronger then the vanilla sword, but also slower.

![9](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vcQUBLG9/images/08e1828370f4a66b0f40d21074b4b3776abb2f31.gif)
 ---

(The weapons description is taken from wikipedia and other places as a quick notice about them)

 

The main goal of the mod is to have more weapon variants, not to add overpowered items.

Currently **supports forge, fabric and neoforge 1.21.9 - 1.21.11, 26.1.x.**

Versions below 1.21.9. are not supported.
